name: Cholesterol / Lipid Panel Test Codes
description: CPT and LOINC codes for cholesterol and lipid panel laboratory tests including total cholesterol, LDL, HDL, and triglycerides. Used in statin therapy for cardiovascular disease (SPC) and other cardiovascular risk management measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Lipid panel (total cholesterol, HDL cholesterol, LDL cholesterol, triglycerides)
Cholesterol, serum or whole blood, total
Lipoprotein, direct measurement; high-density cholesterol (HDL cholesterol)
Lipoprotein, blood; electrophoretic separation and quantitation
Lipoprotein, blood; high resolution fractionation and quantitation
HDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by calculation
LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
